data.title: GMGN Co-founder: The web version now supports ETH limit orders and multi-wallet trading.
data.description: GMGN co-founder Haze posted on the X platform that the web version has completed several feature updates, including support for ETH limit orders and advanced strategies, support for multi-wallet profit and loss (PNL) statistics, support for multi-wallet trading and continuous click trading, and has completed the first round of speed-up optimizations, and will continue to be improved.

data.title: AI research lab NeoCognition has raised $40 million in seed funding, led by Cambium Capital and others.
data.description: AI research lab NeoCognition announced the completion of a $40 million seed funding round, co-led by Cambium Capital and Walden Catalyst Ventures, with participation from Vista Equity Partners. Angel investors include Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan and Databricks co-founder Ion Stoica. Headquartered in Palo Alto, California, the company was co-founded by Ohio State University Associate Professor Yu Su, along with Xiang Deng and Yu Gu, and focuses on improving the reliability of AI agents. Their solution involves allowing agents to build domain-specific "world models" in real-world use to adapt to specific business environments, rather than relying on general pre-trained models. Currently targeting enterprise clients, the company plans to embed sustainably optimized AI agents into its SaaS products; no publicly released product has yet been launched.

data.title: Prediction Market Shows Bets Against Atlanta United Victory in April 2026
data.description:
A monitoring report indicates that an account with profits exceeding $220,000 has invested approximately $42,700 in a position against Atlanta United's victory over New England Revolution on April 22, 2026. According to Odaily, the opening price for this position was 54.9¢, and the current price stands at 55.5¢, resulting in a floating profit of about $477.

Atlanta United has been struggling recently, securing only one win in their last eight matches and suffering three consecutive defeats. In contrast, New England Revolution has achieved four consecutive victories, demonstrating solid defensive performance. The historical match record between the two teams is closely matched, and injuries are influencing market expectations, which remain relatively balanced.

data.title: ECB's Simkus: Rate Hike Possible This Year
data.description: European Central Bank Governing Council member Simkus has stated that the possibility of an interest rate hike by the ECB this year cannot be ruled out. According to Jin10, Simkus emphasized the need to remain vigilant regarding inflationary pressures and economic developments. The ECB has been closely monitoring the economic situation in the Eurozone, and any decision on interest rates will depend on future data and economic conditions. Simkus's comments highlight the ongoing uncertainty in monetary policy as the ECB navigates the challenges posed by inflation and economic growth.

data.title: Greece Introduces €500 Million Economic Relief Following Budget Success
data.description: Greece has unveiled new economic relief measures totaling approximately €500 million. Bloomberg posted on X that this decision follows the country's budget performance, which exceeded expectations last year. The Greek government aims to support its citizens and stimulate economic growth with these measures. The relief package is part of a broader strategy to maintain fiscal stability while addressing economic challenges. The announcement underscores Greece's commitment to sustaining its economic recovery and providing assistance to those in need.

data.title: Another cargo ship was attacked while attempting to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: On April 22 local time, Vanguard reported that a cargo ship was attacked while attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz, marking the third vessel attacked that day. The Panamanian-flagged cargo ship, the "MSC Francesca," was reportedly attacked approximately 6 nautical miles off the coast of Iran while en route south through the Strait of Hormuz into the Gulf of Oman. The vessel reported damage to its hull and living quarters. Earlier that day, the UK's Office for Maritime Trade Operations had released reports of attacks on two other vessels in the same area. (CCTV News) (Jinshi Data APP)

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with MSTR up 5.93%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN up 3.89%, MSTR up 5.93%, ABTC up 5.65%, HOOD up 3.41%, SBET up 4.89%, MARA up 4.10%, and CRCL up 4.14%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: QCP: The BTC rebound is largely due to easing risks; the market remains in a trading range.
data.description: QCP released a market analysis stating that BTC rebounded from a low of approximately $75,000 to $78,000, but this rally was primarily driven by risk easing rather than fundamental improvement. It pointed out that the extension of the Iranian ceasefire reduced short-term geopolitical risks, while Federal Reserve officials maintained a data-dependent stance, without releasing any clear easing signals. The rebound in futures open interest and the continued negative funding rates indicate new short-selling activity, with current market movements reflecting volatility driven by expectations of short squeezes. In the options market, short-term volatility is around 40%, with a skew towards downside protection and a relatively flat term structure, indicating an overall range-bound pattern. QCP believes that future market movements will still depend on oil prices and monetary policy signals; in the absence of clear catalysts, the market may maintain range-bound trading.

data.title: Zhongtian Technology Highlights Fiber Optic Industry Concerns Amid AI Growth
data.description: Zhongtian Technology has issued a notice addressing the heightened attention from the market and media regarding the demand and pricing in the fiber optic cable industry. According to Jin10, the global advancement of artificial intelligence technology has led to increased demand for related fiber optic products. However, the overall development of the industry is closely tied to the evolution of global communication technology and the capital expenditure plans of downstream clients. The company warns that potential adjustments in industry policies, unmet market demand expectations, tight supply of core raw materials, or significant price fluctuations could impact its production operations, product costs, and profitability. Investors are advised to invest rationally and be aware of investment risks.

data.title: Ondo Team Transfers $34 Million in Tokens to New Wallet
data.description: On April 22, the Ondo team transferred tokens valued at $34 million to a new wallet, according to BlockBeats. Historically, such transactions have been followed by gradual transfers to centralized exchanges (CEX), often leading to a sustained decline in prices.

data.title: PicWe Launches New AI Agent Wallet
data.description: PicWe announced that its self-developed next-generation wallet product has completed internal testing and entered public beta. PicWe Wallet expands the "hardware wallet" from a dedicated device to an everyday terminal capability; mobile phones, computers, and security keys can all be used directly as wallets. By generating and storing keys within the device, users do not need mnemonic phrases or manual private key management. Key operations are completed locally, without server storage, reducing the barrier to entry and risk from the source. With this design, users can perform on-chain operations like using ordinary applications. Simultaneously, the wallet also supports providing account capabilities for automated programs (such as AI agents) under certain rules, enabling more flexible on-chain interaction. The public beta version already supports multi-chain asset management, asset exchange, and the use of stablecoins to pay transaction fees, bringing users closer to a "seamless blockchain experience." In terms of broader ecosystem development, PicWe is building an integrated infrastructure around RWA and intelligent applications, covering core aspects such as asset issuance, circulation, and settlement, serving enterprises' efficiency and cost goals in scenarios such as cross-border settlement, asset digitization, and supply chain collaboration.

data.title: PicWe Launches Public Testing for Next-Generation Wallet Product
data.description:
PicWe has announced the completion of internal testing for its newly developed wallet product, which is now entering public testing. According to Odaily, the PicWe Wallet expands the concept of a 'hardware wallet' from specialized devices to everyday terminals, allowing phones, computers, and security keys to function as wallets.

The wallet generates and stores keys within the device, eliminating the need for mnemonic phrases and manual private key management. Key operations are completed locally without server storage, reducing usage barriers and risks from the outset.

This design enables users to perform on-chain operations as easily as using regular applications. Additionally, the wallet supports account capabilities for automated programs, such as AI agents, facilitating more flexible on-chain interactions.

The public test version includes features like multi-chain asset management, asset exchange, and stablecoin fee payments, offering users a seamless blockchain experience.

PicWe is also developing integrated infrastructure around Real World Assets (RWA) and intelligent applications, covering asset issuance, circulation, and settlement. This aims to enhance efficiency and cost-effectiveness for businesses in cross-border settlement, asset digitization, and supply chain collaboration scenarios.

data.title: EU Proposes Measures to Address Energy Crisis Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: The European Union has unveiled a series of measures aimed at mitigating the energy crisis exacerbated by the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that the plan includes optimizing the distribution of jet fuel as part of broader efforts to stabilize energy supplies across the region. The EU's initiative seeks to address the disruptions in energy markets caused by geopolitical tensions, ensuring a steady flow of resources to member states. This move comes as part of a coordinated response to the challenges posed by the conflict, highlighting the EU's commitment to energy security and resilience.

data.title: Thailand's Finance Minister Projects GDP Growth and Inflation Rates
data.description: Thailand's Finance Minister has projected the country's GDP to grow by 1.4% in 2026 and 2.2% in 2027. According to Jin10, the inflation rate is expected to be 2.9% this year and 2.5% next year.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Discusses Simplification in Ethereum Development
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, addressed the concept of simplification during a discussion. According to Foresight News, Buterin explained that simplification can be understood in two ways: one involving user interface elements like buttons, and the other concerning the system itself. He emphasized that for Ethereum, the latter is crucial. Excessive complexity can reduce engagement from both users and developers, and negatively impact user experience.

data.title: Prediction Market Giants Expand into Perpetual Contracts
data.description: Leading players in the prediction market are shifting their focus to the larger derivatives stage. According to PANews, on April 22, both Polymarket and Kalshi announced significant plans to enter the perpetual contracts sector, marking a strategic expansion for these major prediction market companies.

data.title: JPMorgan Adjusts S&P 500 Year-End 2026 Target Amid Geopolitical Concerns
data.description:
JPMorgan strategists have revised their year-end 2026 target for the S&P 500 index, increasing it from 7,200 to 7,600. According to NS3.AI, the team also updated its earnings per share (EPS) forecast for 2026 to $330, up from $315, and adjusted the 2027 estimate to $385 from $355, while maintaining the forward multiple at 22 times.

Dubravko Lakos-Bujas, a key strategist at JPMorgan, indicated that a swift resolution of U.S.-Iran tensions could potentially elevate the target to approximately 8,000. However, the team cautioned that high oil prices and ongoing geopolitical risks might lead to a short-term consolidation phase for the market.

data.title: Capital Group's American Funds EUPAC Fund Increases Stake in Metaplanet
data.description: Capital Group's American Funds EUPAC Fund (AEPGX) has increased its holdings in Metaplanet, a company involved in Bitcoin treasuries. According to Foresight News, the fund has acquired an additional 2.79 million shares of Metaplanet, bringing its total holdings to 3.85 million shares, valued at $8.8 million. The move is part of the fund's strategy to expand its investment in Bitcoin-related assets. Capital Group manages assets worth $3 trillion, highlighting the significance of this investment decision.

data.title: Finnair Warns of Jet Fuel Supply Risks Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: Finnair Oyj, Finland's national airline, has issued a warning regarding potential risks to jet fuel availability due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Bloomberg posted on X that the airline is closely monitoring the situation as tensions in the region could impact fuel supplies. The prolonged conflict has raised concerns about disruptions in the supply chain, which could affect airlines globally. Finnair's alert highlights the broader implications of geopolitical tensions on the aviation industry, emphasizing the need for contingency planning to mitigate potential fuel shortages.
